S.FORM: = Baldwin Lonsdale = Mntucing hngkawas idas jiyax ka Baldwin Lonsdale ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Vanuatu ta sayang o kiya ka Baldwin Lonsdale, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 9 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = baldwin lonsdalə = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas idas ɟijax ka baldwin lonsdalə ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan *anuatu ta sajaŋ o kija ka baldwin lonsdalə, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Baldwin Lonsdale = Mntucing hngkawas idas jiyax ka Baldwin Lonsdale ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Vanuatu ta sayang o kiya ka Baldwin Lonsdale, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 9 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = baldwin lonsdalə = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas idas ɟijax ka baldwin lonsdalə ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan *anuatu ta sajaŋ o kija ka baldwin lonsdalə, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
